sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system documentation available for this game

special_mechanics.name: Helicopter Piloting
special_mechanics.description: Player pilots an AH-64 Apache combat helicopter with altitude, speed, fuel, and damage management. Includes Vulcan cannon with unlimited ammo, switchable missiles, and optional equipment (chaff grenades, extra fuel, ground missiles). Requires precise speed reduction and alignment for landing at heliports.

special_mechanics.name: Gun Shooting Mode
special_mechanics.description: Light gun segments where player dismounts helicopter and shoots enemy soldiers. Screen auto-scrolls right. Compatible with NES Zapper, LaserScope headset, or standard controller.

special_mechanics.name: Maze Exploration Mode
special_mechanics.description: First-person interior navigation through enemy base corridors. Player collects ammo, health rations, and obtains vital mission items while avoiding traps.

tier_notes: Tier 3 empirical/qualitative data. This is a multi-mode action game with three distinct gameplay segments (helicopter simulation, light gun shooting, maze exploration). No detailed physics documentation available in sources. Player movement parameters are not separately documented as the game focuses on helicopter piloting rather than traditional character platforming. Gun shooting segments use automatic screen scrolling and light gun mechanics rather than manual character movement.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Laser Invasion
